F8.coverage_limitations: n256 REV/missingness should be reported with selective-suite caveat.

T2.coverage_limitations: Must explicitly separate n256 control provenance and selective EXP-112 coverage.

T3.coverage_limitations: n256 rows should include incomplete-seed annotations for selective configs.

T4.coverage_limitations: Generator taxonomy should note n256 targeted subset usage.

T5.coverage_limitations: n256 extension likely selective/inconclusive until seed-complete reruns.

T6.coverage_limitations: Must carry forward 26 truncated-log caveat and per-config seed deficits.

decision.n256_caveat: Wave_2 has 26 truncated logs missing KEY_AUDIT_JSON; EXP-112 n=256 selective configs have partial seed coverage (min 5, median 8, max 9).
decision.rationale: N3 decision memo is uniformly 'same' across Q1–Q5; n=256 currently confirms/qualifies existing claims but does not justify a distinct new claim block.
